entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `package_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT, `text` TEXT, `big_text` TEXT, `sub_text` TEXT, `ticker` TEXT, `extras_json` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', `raw_json` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}', `signature` TEXT NOT NULL, `notification_type` TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'local', `is_remote` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `receive_count` INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `first_received_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, `last_received_at` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_notifications_signature
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_notifications_signature` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`signature`)

indices.name: index_notifications_package_name
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_notifications_package_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`package_name`)

indices.name: index_notifications_last_received_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_notifications_last_received_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`last_received_at`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`title` TEXT, `text` TEXT, `big_text` TEXT, `sub_text` TEXT, tokenize=unicode61, content=`notifications`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notifications_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `notifications` BEGIN DELETE FROM `notifications_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notifications_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `notifications` BEGIN DELETE FROM `notifications_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notifications_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `notifications` BEGIN INSERT INTO `notifications_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `text`, `big_text`, `sub_text`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`text`, NEW.`big_text`, NEW.`sub_text`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_notifications_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `notifications` BEGIN INSERT INTO `notifications_fts`(`docid`, `title`, `text`, `big_text`, `sub_text`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`, NEW.`text`, NEW.`big_text`, NEW.`sub_text`); END

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`package_name` TEXT NOT NULL, `tag` TEXT NOT NULL, `app_label` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`package_name`))

indices.name: index_app_tags_tag
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_app_tags_tag` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`tag`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `notification_id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `raw_json` TEXT NOT NULL, `received_at` INTEGER NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY(`notification_id`) REFERENCES `notifications`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_notification_raw_logs_notification_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_notification_raw_logs_notification_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`notification_id`)

indices.name: index_notification_raw_logs_received_at
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_notification_raw_logs_received_at` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`received_at`)
